title: Programming Assessment

prerequisites.text: (CSC1015F/S and CSC1016S) or (CSC1010H and CSC1011H). Note: Required for all students majoring in Computer Science and/or wishing to continue to any third-year CS courses. Compulsory course in the Computer Science major CSC05.

outline: All students who take advanced courses in Computer Science need to build on a foundation of strong programming skills. The aim of this course is to assess and confirm mastery in fundamental programming skills before students can proceed to advanced courses.
